steps.name: retriever-timing-threshold
steps.summary: DRI1 updated scripts/demo_run_quality_checklist.py, tests/test_demo_run_quality_checklist.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-drq2-demo-run-quality-checklist.md. The retriever-decision stage now exposes a 15-second timing variance threshold and the quality checklist test passes.

steps.name: rehearsal-freshness-metadata
steps.summary: DRI2 updated scripts/demo_rehearsal_evidence_capture.py, tests/test_demo_rehearsal_evidence_capture.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-drq3-demo-rehearsal-evidence.md. Rehearsal evidence now includes generated-at freshness metadata, stale-output checks, variance metadata, and threshold application.

steps.name: operator-summary-surface
steps.summary: DRI3 updated scripts/accounting_intelligence_progress_map.py, tests/test_accounting_intelligence_progress_map.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-accounting-intelligence-progress-map.md. The progress map now starts with a compact Operator Summary including status, current horizon, next operator action, automation rate, residual risk, and primary evidence.

steps.name: horizon-close-gate
steps.summary: DRI4 added docs/reports/2026-07-06-demo-rehearsal-improvement-hardening-close-report.md via scripts/demo_rehearsal_improvement_close_gate.py and tests/test_demo_rehearsal_improvement_close_gate.py. The close gate verifies DRI1 timing threshold, DRI2 freshness metadata, and DRI3 operator summary evidence.
